creator: yasi@yasi.to
text:
In 2007/03/25, Zope.org released Zope 2.9.7, a bug-fix version.
- Include Hotfix_20070320 (cross-site scripting vulnerability)
- Reverted backward-incompatible fix for DateTime
- added Python 2.4.4 as optimal Python version to configure

See more: http://zope.org/Products/Zope/2.9.7/CHANGES.txt

This PR will update www/zope29 to 2.9.7 from 2.9.6_1.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
